pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DG-A-004 (Data Governance/Ability) excluded: out_of_scope: 0 core signals, 0 OOS signals, composite 0.438. Highest framework: DDaT at 0.438.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with out_of_scope scope, Data Governance, composite 0.438. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge exclusion of Data Governance (composite 0.438)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Data Governance at ~8% market presence. Data governance programs above IC scope. Exclusion consistent with role scope.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent. Final decision: exclude.
